extraoperators 0.4.0

    • Logical Operators
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

`%c%`
Chain Operator
`%e%`
Element In Set Operator
`%===%` `%!==%`
Strict Identity Operators
`%agele%` `%agel%` `%agle%` `%agl%` `%age%` `%ag%` `%ale%` `%al%` `%ain%` `%a!in%` `%anin%` `%a==%` `%a!=%` `%ac%` `%ae%` `%agrepl%` `%a!grepl%`
Several ways to evaluate whether all values meet logical conditions including logical range comparison helpers
`%anygele%` `%anygel%` `%anygle%` `%anygl%` `%anyge%` `%anyg%` `%anyle%` `%anyl%` `%anyin%` `%any!in%` `%anynin%` `%any==%` `%any!=%` `%anyc%` `%anye%` `%anygrepl%` `%any!grepl%` `%anyflipIn%`
Several ways to evaluate whether any values meet logical conditions
`%gele%` `%gel%` `%gle%` `%gl%` `%g%` `%ge%` `%l%` `%le%` `%!in%` `%nin%` `%flipIn%` `%grepl%` `%!grepl%`
Several logical range comparison helpers
`%?gele%` `%?gel%` `%?gle%` `%?gl%` `%?ge%` `%?g%` `%?le%` `%?l%` `%?in%` `%?!in%` `%?nin%` `%?==%` `%?!=%` `%?c%` `%?e%` `%?grepl%` `%?!grepl%`
Several ways to return an index based on logical range comparison helpers
`%sgele%` `%sgel%` `%sgle%` `%sgl%` `%sge%` `%sg%` `%sle%` `%sl%` `%sin%` `%s!in%` `%snin%` `%s==%` `%s!=%` `%sc%` `%se%` `%sgrepl%` `%s!grepl%`
Several ways to subset based on logical range comparison helpers

Developed by Joshua F. Wiley.
